name: Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Choice of: chopped black olives, onions, tomatoes, chilies, or jalapeno peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray cooking surfaces with non-stick spray or brush with margarine.
2. Place 2 tortillas into the sandwich maker.
3. Place 1/2 cup of cheese mixture into each triangular pocket.
4. Put 2 tortillas on top.
5. Lower the lid, latch it closed, and cook for 3-5 minutes or until done.
6. Serve with sour cream, salsa, or guacamole.
